objective: Implement a strict importer for MARKET total-return index data and build V3.51-compatible forward labels only when the source passes all gates.
forbidden: Do not accept strategy NAV, benchmark NAV, or backtest-derived outputs as labels.
Do not accept price-only index close as total-return labels.
Do not compute labels when the source file is missing or fails validation.
Do not run IC, hit rate, backtest metrics, NAV, drawdown, Sharpe, or model promotion.
acceptance: The importer must write a strict source contract and a manual CSV template.
Missing or invalid source files must block label generation.
Valid source files must be able to generate V3.51-compatible MARKET forward labels.
All generated labels must include signal_date, asset, horizon, forward_adjusted_return, return_basis, label_available_date, and price_adjustment_source.
The report must separate importer readiness from performance validation.
